title: Study Packages
description: A Study Package bundles multiple related analyses (characterization, incidence rates, estimation, prediction) into a single unit that can be executed together and tracked as a research project. Use studies to organize multi-analysis research protocols.
tips: Use the search bar and filter chips (Status, Type, Priority) to find studies quickly. Toggle between table and card views.
Create a new study to group all analyses for a research question into one trackable package.
Within a study, Execute All runs all analyses sequentially in the background — you can re-run individual failed analyses without restarting others.
Study progress is tracked per-analysis with status indicators showing which are pending, running, completed, or failed.
Export the full study as a JSON bundle to reproduce or share the analysis protocol across OHDSI network sites.
Studies map directly to OHDSI study packages — use them for multi-site network study coordination.
